OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jacqueline Baker, property manager, appearing on behalf of John Stewart Company
Francisco G. Torres, Esq. for plaintiff

Clyde Conrad, defendant
William E. Shapiro, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 51 Sixth Street, #702, San Francisco, California.

Trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
